title: Data Lineage
subtitle: {{objects}} objects, {{deps}} dependencies
selectProcedure: Select a procedure from the schema tree

lineageView.selectToViewLineage: Select a procedure to view lineage
lineageView.selectToSeeLineage: Select a procedure to see its data lineage

matrix.empty: No dependencies found. Run an analysis first.

descriptions.explorer: Browse database schemas, view procedure parameters, auto-generated documentation, security findings, and source code.
descriptions.lineage: Trace upstream callers and downstream dependencies for any procedure. Visualize the complete call chain.
descriptions.matrix: View which procedures read, write, or call which objects. Identify CRUD patterns across your codebase.
descriptions.impact: Select any object to discover all procedures that depend on it. Essential for change impact assessment.

impact.selectObject: Select an object to see what depends on it
impact.selectToSeeImpact: Select an object to see its impact
impact.description: The following procedures/functions depend on this object:
